subject: Discovery Call
message: Discussed enterprise migration and volume pricing constraints. Rahul noted they need Slack/Jira hooks.

subject: Compliance Docs Reply
message: Hey Priya, sent you the compliance checklist. Let me know if you received it.

subject: SLA and Security Docs
message: Hi Rahul, thank you for sharing the compliance checklist. Attached is our ISO 27001 certificate and standard service level agreement (SLA) document for your review.

subject: Demo Reminder
message: Hi Rahul, our Zoom link for the demo meeting tomorrow is scheduled for 3:00 PM. Link: https://zoom.us/j/987654321

subject: No Answer Outbound
message: Called Vikram. Phone rang but went to voicemail. Did not leave a message.

subject: Pricing Inquiry from LinkedIn
message: Hello, I saw your post regarding AI CRM automations. Could you share the cost spreadsheet for 50 users? Thanks, Sundar.

subject: Re: Pricing Inquiry from LinkedIn
message: Hi Sundar, thank you for reaching out. We have sent our standard pricing sheets. I would love to schedule a brief discovery call to see how we can customize our solution.

subject: WhatsApp Inquiry
message: Hi, I need assistance in connecting my WhatsApp business API. Do you support this?

subject: WhatsApp Response
message: Hi Mark! Yes, Pravesha AI provides native, zero-code integration for WhatsApp Business API. Let me share the setup documentation with you.

subject: Demo Request Video
message: Thanks for the demo link. I am sharing it with our ops head. Let's touch base on Thursday.

subject: Contract Feedback Call
message: Satish called to confirm payment was wired and signed copy was uploaded. Call lasted 5 minutes.

subject: Outcomes Call
message: Discussed final approval status. Lead informed us they went with a cheaper vendor on a long term lock.

subject: Custom Proposal Details
message: Hi Bruce, attached is the integration blueprint showing how Jira tickets sync automatically with Pravesha AI pipelines.

subject: Discovery Call
message: Talked about security compliance parameters. Handled questions about data encryption at rest.

subject: SOC 2 Type II Report
message: Hi Tony, as discussed on our call, please find attached our latest SOC 2 report and security whitepaper.

subject: Closing Call
message: Completed pricing agreement. Satish agreed to the base setup price. Call lasted 12 minutes.

subject: Plugin Specifications
message: Lead called asking about compatibility with Twilio numbers. Confirmed we support SIP trunking.

subject: Compliance Inquiry
message: Please send us copies of your corporate registration and GDPR privacy policies.

subject: Contract Draft
message: Hi Lionel, here is the draft agreement containing the custom payment schedule options for your review.

subject: CTO On-premise Review
message: Explained that our architecture is fully cloud native and we cannot offer an on-premise binary. Lead closed.

subject: Welcome Outreach Call
message: Introductory outreach call. Confirmed receipt of form and scheduled next steps discovery.

subject: Introductory SMS
message: Hi Vikram, Anjali here from Pravesha AI. I tried calling you. Let me know a good time to connect regarding CRM setup.

subject: Discovery Attempt
message: Tried calling. Sundar did not answer. Followed up with pricing email.

subject: Technical Review Call
message: Sync call with solutions engineer. Reviewed custom integrations requirements.

subject: Docs Receipt Check
message: Hi Tony, let me know if you received the SOC 2 whitepaper I sent over email earlier.
